sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_minus (value1 Int32, value2 Int32, result Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_minus VALUES (10, 5, minus(10, 5)), (20, 15, minus(20, 15)), (30, 10, minus(30, 10));
UPDATE test_minus SET result = minus(value1, value2) WHERE value1 > value2;
SELECT value1, value2, result, minus(value1, value2) AS calculated_result FROM test_minus;
SELECT minus(now(), INTERVAL 5 DAY) AS five_days_ago;
